productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Brown Formal Shoes
description: Style NoteReferencing the classic derby boot, this pair of U.S. Polo Association shoes is a great formal wear option - they're hard wearing but look smart. Add a raffish feel to your on-duty ensemble with these shoes, they'll look good with denims, a tee and a plaid shirt.Product DetailsBrown derby shoe with perforations on the toe box, central lace-ups Padded tongue and innerOutsole adhered to the upper for durabilityTPU outsole with branded groove on the forefoot and a stacked heelMaterial and CareLeatherWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dustUse a leather conditioner and a brush for added shine
